images.alt: A hyper-surreal editorial beauty portrait of a stunning woman wearing elegant tortoiseshell glasses against a radiant yellow-to-white gradient background. Brilliant prismatic rainbow refraction, chromatic dispersion, and soft optical flares emerge from the ends of both lens projections. images.alt: A highly detailed modern American comic book illustration of a realistic koala remaining anatomically accurate and non-anthropomorphic, crouched naturally atop a jagged rocky outcrop during a violent thunderstorm. The koala wears an ornate Norse-inspired Viking helmet with engraved steel, Celtic knotwork, cheek guards, and a pronounced nasal guard, while its ears naturally protrude through openings in the helmet. A flowing crimson cape is fastened around its shoulders with engraved Nordic brooches, accompanied by subtle leather harnesses that do not alter its natural animal anatomy. Clutched naturally in its front paws is a colossal enchanted rune-carved stone war hammer radiating brilliant blue lightning and crackling arcs of electricity. Massive storm clouds churn overhead as bolts of lightning illuminate the sky, with flying debris, shattered rocks, glowing magical runes, swirling dust, and cinematic atmospheric effects surrounding the scene. Dynamic perspective, dramatic rim lighting, rich saturated colors, bold clean comic-book ink lines, intricate textures, premium graphic novel cover quality, epic Norse mythology fantasy atmosphere, highly detailed, square orientation.
